name: Swimlane Task Bar
description: Canvas-rendered three-segment task bar used for timed events in swimlane and timeline surfaces.
useWhen: Displaying a timed task in a swimlane, timeline, or execution trace surface.
Showing input, compute, and output subsegments inside one task duration.
forbiddenOverrides: DOM/CSS reimplementation of the task bar
agentReuseRule: Import patterns/swimlane-task/pattern.js and call window.PtoSwimlaneTaskPattern.drawTaskBar. Do not rebuild the task bar with DOM/CSS or rewrite the segment math locally.
